category_sources: source_facts.description: Facebook's branch of Apache Thrift; official README describes Thrift as serialization, RPC, and code generation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `fbthrift`; official GitHub repository title is facebook/fbthrift.
docs_sources: Official README is the primary documentation surface; official GitHub wiki is available for project documentation.

tags_sources: Official README describes Thrift as a code generator, serialization framework, and RPC framework with strong C++ support.
